zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Wrottesley於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾時，他的父親William de Wrottesley37歲，母親Petronilla de Audley2歲。他於1344年與Joan de Bassett結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年1月23日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年97歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wrottesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wrottesley in Tettenhall (Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Wrottesley was born about 1285, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Wrottesley, was 37 and his mother, Petronilla de Audley, was 2. He married Joan de Bassett in 1344. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 23 January 1381, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Wrottesley est né environ 1285, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Wrottesley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Petronilla de Audley, avait 2 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Bassett en 1344. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1381, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Wrottesleyが約1285年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父William de Wrottesleyは37歳，母Petronilla de Audleyは2歳であった。1344年にJoan de Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年1月23日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Wrottesley(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Wrottesley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla de Audley(은)는 2세였다. 그는 1344년 Joan de Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 1월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Wrottesley nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Wrottesley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla de Audley, tinha 2 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Wrottesley родился около 1285 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Wrottesley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla de Audley, 2. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Bassett в 1344 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 января 1381 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.
